facts.description: Names the Subscription model or equivalent billing model class
Identifies billing plan tiers (e.g. free, pro, team, enterprise or sandbox, paid)
Explains how sandbox limits are enforced (rate limits, usage caps, middleware)
Names specific files involved in billing (e.g. billing router, subscription service)
Describes the payment processing flow (Stripe integration, webhooks)
Names specific functions involved in subscription management
Describes how plan limits map to features or quotas
